assertion_results.text: Validation identifies that the Bug description is missing the Steps to Reproduce section (required by bug-template-mock.md) (Step 1)
assertion_results.evidence: validation-result.md line 39: "`### **Steps to Reproduce**` -- not present anywhere in the bug description." Also listed in the missing sections table on line 27 as "**No -- MISSING**" and in the result summary on line 44: "Bug ACME-501 is missing required sections: **Steps to Reproduce**, **Expected Result**."

assertion_results.text: Validation identifies that the Bug description is missing the Expected Result section (required by bug-template-mock.md) (Step 1)
assertion_results.evidence: validation-result.md line 40: "`### **Expected Result**` -- not present anywhere in the bug description." Also listed in the missing sections table on line 28 as "**No -- MISSING**" and in the result summary on line 44: "Bug ACME-501 is missing required sections: **Steps to Reproduce**, **Expected Result**."

assertion_results.text: The skill stops execution after identifying missing sections — it does NOT proceed to Steps 2-5 (Step 1 stop rule)
assertion_results.evidence: validation-result.md lines 46-61: "## Execution stopped" section explicitly states the stop rule was applied and lists Steps 2-7 as "skipped". Line 48 quotes the stop rule: "Per the triage-bug skill Step 1 stop rule: 'If any Required Section is missing from the Bug description, list the missing sections and inform the user. Stop execution immediately.'" Line 61 confirms: "No investigation was conducted. No root cause was determined. No Task was created or linked."

assertion_results.text: The error message lists the specific missing sections and references the Bug template path from Bug Configuration
assertion_results.evidence: validation-result.md line 44: "Bug ACME-501 is missing required sections: **Steps to Reproduce**, **Expected Result**. The bug description does not follow the template at `docs/templates/bug-template.md`." This lists both specific missing sections by name and references the template path. The template path is also referenced on line 21: "The bug description template at `docs/templates/bug-template.md`".
